layer_map.what: RequestBar markup restructure: wrap URL input in `.url-bar` flex container with leading aria-hidden `<Icon name="link">`, exact placeholder, icon-only Share + `aria-label="Share"`, keep Save label — presentational only, no logic

`.url-bar` container + focus-within ring; `.method-select` treatment with `justify-content:center` removed and `color` still unset; `.btn-ghost` Save rest+hover; seven `[data-mstyle='chip']` counter-rules kept in lockstep with `METHODS`; all scoped under `.request-bar`
Open-panel rebind: `.dropdown-content` `box-shadow var(--shadow-lg)` + 1px inter-item gap; `.dropdown-item` padding `6px 8px` — bounded cross-component change, ripples to dev-only PrimitivesDemo
Existing `link` Icon consumed as URL leading icon — no change

Computed-style EXACT-equality Playwright CT on the five props + thresholded screenshot diff; tokens.css + `data-mstyle='soft'` fixture, Radix two-step dismiss gate, non-empty-URL no-reflow baseline, mstyle variants beyond soft; rebaseline Dropdown panel snapshot; existing suites stay green

key_design_decisions.chosen_approach: `.url-bar` flex container [aria-hidden link Icon + existing input, gap 6px]; input stays bound to `RequestSpec.url` via `updateActiveSpec`; `canSend` trim guard reads same value
key_design_decisions.why: Matches reference `.url-bar`; icon is decorative so aria-hidden; zero behaviour change preserves 009/010 (AC-3/AC-12); Icon reused from atoms
key_design_decisions.alternatives_rejected: Bare input with `::before` pseudo-icon — can't host the SVG atom, duplicates icon markup

key_design_decisions.chosen_approach: Keep `color` UNSET on `.request-bar .request-bar__method.method`; remove only the extra `justify-content:center`
key_design_decisions.why: Documented cascade hazard: per-method colour falls through `[data-mstyle]` at the (0,3,0) tie won by source-order; adding `color` kills all seven per-method colours with no compile error (AC-13)
key_design_decisions.alternatives_rejected: Setting explicit per-method `color` on the trigger — reintroduces the hazard docs/architecture.md warns against

key_design_decisions.chosen_approach: Keep the seven `(0,5,0)` `[data-mstyle='chip']` per-method counter-rules in lockstep with `METHODS` in httpMethods.ts
key_design_decisions.why: Removing/drifting any reintroduces the white-on-white chip regression; CT asserts per-method computed colour across mstyle variants, not just soft
key_design_decisions.alternatives_rejected: Dropping counter-rules assuming soft-only usage — Shell can set any mstyle

key_design_decisions.chosen_approach: Drop visible text node (icon-only), restore `aria-label="Share"`; stays disabled no-op in final slot
key_design_decisions.why: Visible text previously supplied the accessible name; icon-only without aria-label breaks `getByRole` name queries (AC-8, AC-6)
key_design_decisions.alternatives_rejected: Icon-only with no aria-label — silently breaks accessible-name regression queries

key_design_decisions.chosen_approach: Keep visible label; bind reference `.btn-ghost` rest (color `--text-muted`, border `--border`, bg `--bg-elev`) + hover (color `--text`, border-color `--border-strong`)
key_design_decisions.why: Reference keeps Save labelled; hover is pure treatment via existing tokens (AC-9)
key_design_decisions.alternatives_rejected: Icon-only Save — reference shows labelled; out of scope

key_design_decisions.chosen_approach: Edit shared `Dropdown.css` in place: `box-shadow var(--shadow-lg)`, 1px inter-item gap, `.dropdown-item` padding `6px 8px`; accept ripple to PrimitivesDemo + rebaseline snapshot
key_design_decisions.why: Panel is IN scope (defer-alternative rejected at /specify); only consumers are RequestBar + dev-only tree-shaken PrimitivesDemo, so blast radius is bounded and deliberate (AC-10)
key_design_decisions.alternatives_rejected: Fork a RequestBar-local dropdown panel class — duplicates the molecule, violates DRY

key_design_decisions.chosen_approach: Bind all shadow/radius/colour/padding to EXISTING tokens (`--shadow-lg`, `--radius-md`, `--radius`, `--bg-elev`, `--bg-hover`, `--border`, `--border-strong`, `--font-mono`, `--text-muted`); raw px only for item padding + panel gap where no token exists
key_design_decisions.why: Every target value already exists as a token; "prefer design tokens over literal values" (§7); no token additions (AC-1, OOS F-spec-2)
key_design_decisions.alternatives_rejected: Adding new tokens or restoring un-gated `.method` colour defaults — explicitly out of scope

key_design_decisions.chosen_approach: Computed-style EXACT-equality Playwright CT + thresholded screenshot diff; tokens.css + `data-mstyle='soft'` fixture, Radix two-step dismiss gate, non-empty-URL no-reflow baseline
key_design_decisions.why: jsdom can't resolve computed/pseudo styles — real-browser CT required (AC-11); reuses 005/010 fixture-scoping lessons
key_design_decisions.alternatives_rejected: Vitest/jsdom-only assertions — cannot read resolved computed styles or pseudo-elements

key_design_decisions.chosen_approach: `toHaveScreenshot(..., { maxDiffPixelRatio: 0.01, threshold: 0.1 })` on the RequestBar/panel fidelity snapshots
key_design_decisions.why: Reuses the 010 precedent verbatim for consistency with the established fidelity suite; settles Q-1 with an explicit (non-eyeballed) threshold (AC-11)
key_design_decisions.alternatives_rejected: A fresh/tighter threshold — inconsistent with the sibling 010 CT, no basis to diverge

file_impact.what_changes: Wrap URL input in a `.url-bar` container + leading aria-hidden `<Icon name="link">`; set placeholder to `Enter URL or paste cURL command…`; drop the Share text node (icon-only) + add `aria-label="Share"`; keep Save label. No logic change.

Add `.url-bar` container treatment + `:focus-within` accent ring; method-select treatment with `justify-content:center` removed, `color` unset; Save `.btn-ghost` rest+hover; keep the seven chip counter-rules in lockstep; all under `.request-bar`.

Add computed-style EXACT-equality asserts for url-bar / method-select / Save hover / icon-only Share + a thresholded screenshot diff (`maxDiffPixelRatio: 0.01, threshold: 0.1`); cover mstyle variants beyond soft; non-empty-URL baseline.
Extend unit asserts: exact placeholder string, Share icon-only accessible name (`getByRole` name = Share), Save label retained.
Add panel computed-style asserts (shadow/gap/item-padding) + rebaseline the panel screenshot snapshot; keep the Radix two-step dismiss gate.

doc_impact.what_changes: Extend the `RequestBar — method-select CSS cascade` section to note the new `.url-bar` container structure + the icon-only Share, and the shared Dropdown open-panel reference values (shadow-lg / 6px 8px item pad / 1px gap).
Refresh the RequestBar/Dropdown one-liners if the URL-input structure or Share affordance description drifts.

risks.risk: Shared Dropdown panel rebind ripples to dev-only PrimitivesDemo + visual-snapshot baselines (unrelated dropdown regression / snapshot failure)
risks.mitigation: Limit the edit to box-shadow + item padding + panel gap; deliberately rebaseline the Dropdown snapshot; the other consumer is dev-only, tree-shaken from production.

risks.risk: Method-trigger CSS edit reintroduces white-on-white chip regression (counter-rules drift from `METHODS`) or kills all per-method colours (accidental `color` decl)
risks.mitigation: Keep `color` unset on `.request-bar__method.method`; keep the seven `(0,5,0)` counter-rules in lockstep with `METHODS`; assert per-method computed colour across mstyle variants (not just soft) in CT.

risks.risk: Method-trigger + Save-hover may already match the reference from 010 — locking ACs without a runtime check could enshrine wrong values (spec Q-2)
risks.mitigation: Carry a design-auditor runtime computed-style + screenshot diff vs design/reference.html to /breakdown as a verification task before locking those ACs; residual drift, if any, is context-only.

risks.risk: Dropping Share's visible label without an accessible name breaks existing `getByRole` name queries
risks.mitigation: Add `aria-label="Share"` when going icon-only; run existing RequestBar CT + unit accessible-name queries as a regression gate.

risks.risk: CT flakiness — Radix dismiss arm-race, keycap-mount no-reflow baseline confound, jsdom cannot resolve computed/pseudo styles
risks.mitigation: Real-browser Playwright CT only; two-step dismiss gate; non-empty-URL no-reflow baseline; clear playwright/.cache + node_modules/.vite + dist on clean-file build errors.

specialist_consultation.sub_question: Layer map, key decisions, risks, constitution flags for the fidelity pass
specialist_consultation.input_summary: Single Presentation layer; keep method-trigger `color` unset; keep chip counter-rules in lockstep; restore Share aria-label; reuse 010 screenshot threshold 0.01/0.1

dependencies: None — no packages to install, no services to configure, no environment variables. Reuses the existing `link` Icon atom, `tokens.css` custom-properties, Radix (already in deps), and the Playwright CT harness.
